failedAssertions.reason: updateEnvFile() duplicates .env keys when --overwrite not set. When a key already exists in .env and migration runs without --overwrite, the existing line is preserved but the key is NOT tracked in updatedKeys, causing the new value to be appended as a duplicate line. Root cause: scripts/migrate-to-nanocore.ts line ~1372, the else branch (when !this.args.overwrite) does newLines.push(line) but does not call updatedKeys.add(key). Fix: add updatedKeys.add(key) in the else branch.
Same updateEnvFile() bug as VAL-CHAN-005. Existing PI_MODEL=existing-model preserved but duplicate PI_MODEL=gpt-4-new appended. Same root cause and fix.
